headline: Jim Cramer on Lam Research: “You’ve Got a Winner in Lam Research”
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the stocks highlighted in Jim Cramer’s latest Mad Money recap as he provided top stock insights. A caller sought Cramer’s opinion on the stock, and he replied: Oh yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah. I agree. Lam is the winner of what happened in Micron. People didn’t seem to notice. […]

headline: BofA Reaffirms Buy on IBM Stock Amid Agentic AI Expansion
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) ranks among the best most active stocks to buy right now. Following a discussion with Arvind Krishna, CEO of International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM), BofA Securities reiterated a Buy rating and a $340 price objective for the company’s shares on March 10.
